text.title: kubernetes Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for kubernetes as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Setting requests equal to limits (Guaranteed QoS) for all pods.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Guaranteed QoS is appropriate for latency-sensitive workloads. For most workloads, Burstable QoS (requests lower than limits) allows better bin-packing and handles traffic spikes without OOMKill.

failure-mode.description: Setting HPA minReplicas to 1 for production services.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: A single replica has no redundancy during rolling updates, node maintenance, or pod restarts. Use minReplicas: 2 minimum; add PodAntiAffinity to spread across nodes.
